item.title: [Telegram News] For all the features from this update, like
item.description:
For all the features from this update, like links in poll options , support for .md files and new browser settings – check out the full blog:
https://telegram.org/blog/watch-apps-and-more
June Features
1 • 2 • 3 • More
item.content:encoded:
For all the features from this update, like links in poll options, support for .md files and new browser settings – check out the full blog:
https://telegram.org/blog/watch-apps-and-more

June Features
1 • 2 • 3 • More

item.title: [Telegram News] AI Admins for Groups.
item.description:
AI Admins for Groups. Groups can now add AI bots as admins to process join requests with unique features like captcha support .
June Features
1 • 2 • 3 • More
item.content:encoded:
AI Admins for Groups. Groups can now add AI bots as admins to process join requests with unique features like captcha support.

June Features
1 • 2 • 3 • More

item.title: [Telegram News] Rich Text Formatting for Bots.
item.description:
Rich Text Formatting for Bots. Telegram bots and AI agents now have access to nearly 100 text formats – like headers, tables, math or code formatting and more.
June Features
1 • 2 • 3 • More
item.content:encoded:
Rich Text Formatting for Bots. Telegram bots and AI agents now have access to nearly 100 text formats – like headers, tables, math or code formatting and more.

June Features
1 • 2 • 3 • More

item.title: [Telegram News] Watch Apps.
item.description:
Watch Apps. Telegram is now available on Apple and Android smartwatches .
Send messages, manage your chats and more without your phone nearby .
June Features
1 • 2 • 3 • More
item.content:encoded:
Watch Apps. Telegram is now available on Apple and Android smartwatches.

Send messages, manage your chats and more without your phone nearby.

June Features
1 • 2 • 3 • More

item.title: [Pavel Durov] ⚠️
item.description:
⚠️ Indian telecom Reliance is sabotaging access to Telegram for millions of users OUTSIDE India (including the UAE) via a rogue method called BGP hijacking.
🧨 The sabotage seems intentional, as Reliance has ignored multiple reports.
😞 This may be part of a competitive war, as Reliance is partially owned by Meta — the company behind WhatsApp .
🌐 Network operators are advised to reject unauthorized BGP announcements from Reliance ( AS18101 ) to prevent route hijacks and ensure stable Internet access for their users.
🤔 Such abuse of global Internet routing is suspicous. I wouldn’t be surprised if Reliance/WhatsApp were also behind the recent lobbying effort to ban Telegram in India.
🔄 UPDATE: 4 hours after this post, Reliance had to stop the malicious routing. Thanks for the public support, everyone! 🙏
item.content:encoded:
⚠️ Indian telecom Reliance is sabotaging access to Telegram for millions of users OUTSIDE India (including the UAE) via a rogue method called BGP hijacking.

🧨 The sabotage seems intentional, as Reliance has ignored multiple reports.

😞 This may be part of a competitive war, as Reliance is partially owned by Meta — the company behind WhatsApp.

🌐 Network operators are advised to reject unauthorized BGP announcements from Reliance (AS18101) to prevent route hijacks and ensure stable Internet access for their users.

🤔 Such abuse of global Internet routing is suspicous. I wouldn’t be surprised if Reliance/WhatsApp were also behind the recent lobbying effort to ban Telegram in India.

🔄 UPDATE: 4 hours after this post, Reliance had to stop the malicious routing. Thanks for the public support, everyone! 🙏

item.title: [Pavel Durov] 🚫
item.description:
🚫 India’s IT ministry banned Telegram for one week because some users shared leaked exam questions.
This punishes 150 million ordinary Telegram users in India — not the insiders who leaked the exam materials.
And the ban hasn't stopped anything. The leaks just moved to other apps.
🛡 We’ve done a lot to help fix the problem — even though its source is not Telegram.
Over the past few weeks, we removed hundreds of channels sharing leaked exam materials and related scams in India.
We’ve also been making the “edited” label more visible to prevent backdating scams.
🏳️ Telegram is a force for good. Banning it — even temporarily — is a mistake.
item.content:encoded:
🚫 India’s IT ministry banned Telegram for one week because some users shared leaked exam questions.

This punishes 150 million ordinary Telegram users in India — not the insiders who leaked the exam materials.

And the ban hasn't stopped anything. The leaks just moved to other apps.

🛡 We’ve done a lot to help fix the problem — even though its source is not Telegram.

Over the past few weeks, we removed hundreds of channels sharing leaked exam materials and related scams in India.

We’ve also been making the “edited” label more visible to prevent backdating scams.

🏳️ Telegram is a force for good. Banning it — even temporarily — is a mistake.

item.title: [Pavel Durov] ⛔️
item.description:
⛔️ The UK government wants to ban social media for children under 16.
But banning social media for kids only puts them in greater danger.
They will be pushed to use VPNs — and unlock far worse illegal content.
We’ve seen this before.
When the Russian government banned Telegram, 95% of Russian teenagers kept using it. They just moved to VPNs. Same in Iran.
Parents already have the tools to restrict their kids’ digital habits: parental controls, screen-time limits — or no smartphone at all.
🤦‍♂️ Instead, many parents give toddlers iPads just to keep them quiet.
No amount of government regulation will fix that.
Under the new law, all social media users in the UK will have to “prove” they’re over 16 — with an ID, face scan or bank card.
🚨 Thousands in the UK are already arrested for political posts every year.
Is this really about protecting children — or identifying more people to arrest?
P. S. More about digital freedom in my speech — the source material for our $200,000
clipping contest .
item.content:encoded:
⛔️ The UK government wants to ban social media for children under 16.

But banning social media for kids only puts them in greater danger.

They will be pushed to use VPNs — and unlock far worse illegal content.

We’ve seen this before.

When the Russian government banned Telegram, 95% of Russian teenagers kept using it. They just moved to VPNs. Same in Iran.

Parents already have the tools to restrict their kids’ digital habits: parental controls, screen-time limits — or no smartphone at all.

🤦‍♂️ Instead, many parents give toddlers iPads just to keep them quiet.

No amount of government regulation will fix that.

Under the new law, all social media users in the UK will have to “prove” they’re over 16 — with an ID, face scan or bank card.

🚨 Thousands in the UK are already arrested for political posts every year.

Is this really about protecting children — or identifying more people to arrest?

P. S. More about digital freedom in my speech — the source material for our $200,000 clipping contest.

item.title: [Pavel Durov] 🏆
item.description:
🏆
Telegram is launching a $200,000 contest for content creators.
🎬 Create a video about digital freedom using ideas and footage from this speech — plus any content or ideas of your own.
📈 Pass 10,000+ organic views for a chance to win a share of the prize fund.
📣
Full details in the @contest channel.
item.content:encoded:
🏆 Telegram is launching a $200,000 contest for content creators.

🎬 Create a video about digital freedom using ideas and footage from this speech — plus any content or ideas of your own.

📈 Pass 10,000+ organic views for a chance to win a share of the prize fund.

📣 Full details in the @contest channel.

item.title: [Pavel Durov] 🖥
item.description:
🖥 Don't be surprised if you see tables, nested lists, inline media, formulas, headers and more in Telegram messages.
📖 We now support rich formatting for all chatbots.
🔨 Start building! Docs for chatbot devs →
item.content:encoded:
🖥 Don't be surprised if you see tables, nested lists, inline media, formulas, headers and more in Telegram messages.

📖 We now support rich formatting for all chatbots.

🔨 Start building! Docs for chatbot devs →

item.title: [Pavel Durov] 🔄
item.description:
🔄 Telegram’s new update is out. Lots of great new features.
😂 But most importantly: the announcement is actually fun to read.
item.content:encoded:
🔄 Telegram’s new update is out. Lots of great new features.

😂 But most importantly: the announcement is actually fun to read.

item.title: [Pavel Durov] ⌚️
item.description:
⌚️ Telegram is now on Wear OS .
Owners of Galaxy Watch, Pixel Watch, Xiaomi Watch and other smartwatches — enjoy! ☕️
item.content:encoded:
⌚️ Telegram is now on Wear OS.

Owners of Galaxy Watch, Pixel Watch, Xiaomi Watch and other smartwatches — enjoy! ☕️

item.title: [Pavel Durov] ⌚️
item.description: ⌚️ A fully native Telegram app for Apple Watch is out.
item.content:encoded: ⌚️ A fully native Telegram app for Apple Watch is out.

item.title: [Pavel Durov] 🖼 Фото — Pavel Durov
item.description: 🖼 Фото — Pavel Durov

item.title: [Pavel Durov] 💎
item.description:
💎
TON ’s native currency is becoming Gram .
🤑
Gram was the original name of TON ’s currency in the first white paper.
🌱 We’re returning to our roots — and starting a new chapter.
✈️ This rebranding will pave the way for what comes next .
⏳ The transition will take around 3 weeks .
💪
TON remains the name of the blockchain.
🪙 This is step 4 of 7 to Make TON Great Again .
item.content:encoded:
💎 TON’s native currency is becoming Gram.

🤑 Gram was the original name of TON’s currency in the first white paper.

🌱 We’re returning to our roots — and starting a new chapter.

✈️ This rebranding will pave the way for what comes next.

⏳ The transition will take around 3 weeks.

💪 TON remains the name of the blockchain.

🪙 This is step 4 of 7 to Make TON Great Again.

item.title: [Pavel Durov] 🎭
item.description:
🎭 WhatsApp encryption is a giant fraud.
🇺🇸 The state of Texas just sued WhatsApp for lying to users about privacy — because WhatsApp employees have access to “virtually all” private messages.
Now we know what WhatsApp’s founder meant when he said he “sold his users’ privacy.”
Stay safe — stay Telegram! 📱
item.content:encoded:
🎭 WhatsApp encryption is a giant fraud.

🇺🇸 The state of Texas just sued WhatsApp for lying to users about privacy — because WhatsApp employees have access to “virtually all” private messages.

Now we know what WhatsApp’s founder meant when he said he “sold his users’ privacy.”

Stay safe — stay Telegram! 📱

item.title: [Pavel Durov] 🤖
item.description:
🤖 Your Telegram inbox can now run itself.
Assign a bot to read and reply for you — with granular control over its rights and chat access. 🧠
⚙️
Start building !
item.content:encoded:
🤖 Your Telegram inbox can now run itself.

Assign a bot to read and reply for you — with granular control over its rights and chat access. 🧠

⚙️ Start building!

item.title: [Pavel Durov] 💪
item.description:
💪 Anyone can now prompt their own text transformation style — for example, “Gym Bro” — and turn any message into motivational protein poetry.
💪 Then share the style with friends so they can reply like gym bros too.
🤐 All fully confidential. No AI-related privacy leaks.
item.content:encoded:
💪 Anyone can now prompt their own text transformation style — for example, “Gym Bro” — and turn any message into motivational protein poetry.

💪 Then share the style with friends so they can reply like gym bros too.

🤐 All fully confidential. No AI-related privacy leaks.

item.title: [Pavel Durov] 🧠
item.description:
🧠 AI devs asked for this — and we delivered.
🤖 Bots can now talk to other bots on Telegram.
💬 Autonomous agents now have a communication layer humans can follow.
🛠
Start building !
item.content:encoded:
🧠 AI devs asked for this — and we delivered.

🤖 Bots can now talk to other bots on Telegram.

💬 Autonomous agents now have a communication layer humans can follow.

🛠 Start building!

item.title: [Pavel Durov] 🎁
item.content:encoded: 🎁

item.title: [Pavel Durov] 🏆
item.description:
🏆 We just awarded $52,420 to the winners of the Telegram Art Contest .
🎨 The participants did an amazing job with the MiniDurov collectibles.
💎 Their skills and ideas will enrich Telegram’s TON-based NFT ecosystem.
item.content:encoded:
🏆 We just awarded $52,420 to the winners of the Telegram Art Contest.

🎨 The participants did an amazing job with the MiniDurov collectibles.

💎 Their skills and ideas will enrich Telegram’s TON-based NFT ecosystem.

item.title: [Pavel Durov] 🇦🇪
item.description:
🇦🇪 Dubai is full of traffic and crowds again. Already missing the Iranian fireworks — they helped clear the city of the easily impressed.
The UAE’s air defenses proved excellent under fire. For 0% tax, we get better protection than Europeans paying 50%.
item.content:encoded:
🇦🇪 Dubai is full of traffic and crowds again. Already missing the Iranian fireworks — they helped clear the city of the easily impressed.

The UAE’s air defenses proved excellent under fire. For 0% tax, we get better protection than Europeans paying 50%.

item.title: [Pavel Durov] $100,400
item.description:
$100,400 just went to the 15 winners of the TON Consensus Challenge .
🧠
The smartest engineers on the planet — some armed with loyal AI sidekicks — helped us maximize the security of the new consensus mechanism.
🏆
Telegram contests offer generous prize money — and the only path to joining our engineering team.
item.content:encoded:
$100,400 just went to the 15 winners of the TON Consensus Challenge.

🧠 The smartest engineers on the planet — some armed with loyal AI sidekicks — helped us maximize the security of the new consensus mechanism.

🏆 Telegram contests offer generous prize money — and the only path to joining our engineering team.

item.title: [Telegram News] For all the features from this update, like
item.description:
For all the features from this update, like statistics and custom limits for polls, streaming text for bots, silent scheduled messages and more – check out the full blog:
https://telegram.org/blog/ai-bot-revolution-11-new-features
May Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • More
item.content:encoded:
For all the features from this update, like statistics and custom limits for polls, streaming text for bots, silent scheduled messages and more – check out the full blog:
https://telegram.org/blog/ai-bot-revolution-11-new-features

May Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • More

item.title: [Telegram News] Expanded Emoji and Sticker Search.
item.description:
Expanded Emoji and Sticker Search. Over 100 million emoji and stickers can now be found via the search function in the sticker panel.
May Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • More
item.content:encoded:
Expanded Emoji and Sticker Search. Over 100 million emoji and stickers can now be found via the search function in the sticker panel.

May Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • More

item.title: [Telegram News] Custom AI Styles.
item.description:
Custom AI Styles. The text editor allows anyone to use their own prompts to build unique styles .
Each custom style has a shareable link so others users can add it to their editor.
May Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • More
item.content:encoded:
Custom AI Styles. The text editor allows anyone to use their own prompts to build unique styles.

Each custom style has a shareable link so others users can add it to their editor.

May Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • More

item.title: [Telegram News] Chat Automation in Profiles.
item.description:
Chat Automation in Profiles. Every Telegram user can now connect a bot to their profile – and let it respond to messages on their behalf.
May Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • More
item.content:encoded:
Chat Automation in Profiles. Every Telegram user can now connect a bot to their profile – and let it respond to messages on their behalf.

May Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • More

item.title: [Telegram News] Bot-to-Bot Communication.
item.description:
Bot-to-Bot Communication. Bots are now able to respond to other bots , not just users.
AI enthusiasts can utilize this to create custom workflows with autonomous agents .
May Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • More
item.content:encoded:
Bot-to-Bot Communication. Bots are now able to respond to other bots, not just users.

AI enthusiasts can utilize this to create custom workflows with autonomous agents.

May Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • More

item.title: [Telegram News] Guest Bots.
item.description:
Guest Bots. Telegram bots can now be accessed directly in groups and 1-on-1 chats to answer questions and perform tasks .
May Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • More
item.content:encoded:
Guest Bots. Telegram bots can now be accessed directly in groups and 1-on-1 chats to answer questions and perform tasks.

May Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • More

item.title: [Pavel Durov] 🕵️‍♂️
item.description:
🕵️‍♂️ Now you can search 100M+ Telegram stickers and emoji by keyword — in 36 languages.
Telegram’s AI scans and labels millions of public stickers so you can finally find the exact suspicious frog you need. 🤔
item.content:encoded:
🕵️‍♂️ Now you can search 100M+ Telegram stickers and emoji by keyword — in 36 languages.

Telegram’s AI scans and labels millions of public stickers so you can finally find the exact suspicious frog you need. 🤔

item.title: [Pavel Durov] 🌍
item.description:
🌍 With 400 validators across 6 continents, TON is one of the most decentralized blockchain networks on the planet.
🧑‍💻 Telegram becoming the largest validator opened the door for major exchanges and custodians to stake TON without increasing centralization risk.
item.content:encoded:
🌍 With 400 validators across 6 continents, TON is one of the most decentralized blockchain networks on the planet.

🧑‍💻 Telegram becoming the largest validator opened the door for major exchanges and custodians to stake TON without increasing centralization risk.

item.title: [Telegram News] For all the features from this update, like
item.description:
For all the features from this update, like scanning documents on iOS, extra security alerts to protect user privacy, and even more options for polls – check out our blog:
https://telegram.org/blog/ai-editor-mighty-polls-and-more
March Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • 6 • 7 • 8 • 9 • More
item.content:encoded:
For all the features from this update, like scanning documents on iOS, extra security alerts to protect user privacy, and even more options for polls – check out our blog:
https://telegram.org/blog/ai-editor-mighty-polls-and-more

March Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • 6 • 7 • 8 • 9 • More

item.title: [Telegram News] Managed Bots.
item.description:
Managed Bots. Anyone can now utilize AI bots to easily develop, launch and manage their own bot – with no coding required.
More information for developers is available here .
March Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • 6 • 7 • 8 • 9 • More
item.content:encoded:
Managed Bots. Anyone can now utilize AI bots to easily develop, launch and manage their own bot – with no coding required.

More information for developers is available here.

March Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • 6 • 7 • 8 • 9 • More

item.title: [Telegram News] Live and Motion Photos.
item.description:
Live and Motion Photos. Telegram now natively supports Live and Motion Photos.
Android and iOS users can send animated images right from their camera – which are viewable in any app .
March Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • 6 • 7 • 8 • 9 • More
item.content:encoded:
Live and Motion Photos. Telegram now natively supports Live and Motion Photos.

Android and iOS users can send animated images right from their camera – which are viewable in any app.

March Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • 6 • 7 • 8 • 9 • More

item.title: [Telegram News] 10+ Features for Polls.
item.description:
10+ Features for Polls. You can now attach media in polls, set a specific duration for the poll, let users suggest new options – and more .
March Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • 6 • 7 • 8 • 9 • More
item.content:encoded:
10+ Features for Polls. You can now attach media in polls, set a specific duration for the poll, let users suggest new options – and more.

March Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • 6 • 7 • 8 • 9 • More

item.title: [Telegram News] AI Text Editor.
item.description:
AI Text Editor. The message bar now has a built-in editor that can instantly fix grammar , translate your text or rewrite it in several styles :
🤝 Formal
🎯 Short
🍖 Tribal
🗿 Zen
🕯 Biblical
💼 Corp
Telegram AI features are 100% private and optional – powered by the Cocoon AI Network .
March Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • 6 • 7 • 8 • 9 • More
item.content:encoded:
AI Text Editor. The message bar now has a built-in editor that can instantly fix grammar, translate your text or rewrite it in several styles:
🤝 Formal
🎯 Short
🍖 Tribal
🗿 Zen
🕯 Biblical
💼 Corp

Telegram AI features are 100% private and optional – powered by the Cocoon AI Network.

March Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • 6 • 7 • 8 • 9 • More

item.title: [Telegram News] For all the features from this update, like
item.description:
For all the features from this update, like instant stickers from photos, editing stickers and GIFs , a new platform to log in to apps with Telegram and more – check out the full blog:
https://telegram.org/blog/member-tags-disable-sharing-and-more
March Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • 6 • 7 • 8 • 9 • More
item.content:encoded:
For all the features from this update, like instant stickers from photos, editing stickers and GIFs, a new platform to log in to apps with Telegram and more – check out the full blog:

https://telegram.org/blog/member-tags-disable-sharing-and-more

March Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • 6 • 7 • 8 • 9 • More

item.title: [Telegram News] Date Formatting.
item.description:
Date Formatting. The 'Date' formatting option lets you set a specific date and time to add events to a calendar or set a reminder .
Date formatting automatically adapts to each recipient's local date and time .
March Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • 6 • 7 • 8 • 9 • More
item.content:encoded:
Date Formatting. The 'Date' formatting option lets you set a specific date and time to add events to a calendar or set a reminder.

Date formatting automatically adapts to each recipient's local date and time.

March Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • 6 • 7 • 8 • 9 • More

item.title: [Telegram News] Captions for GIFs.
item.description:
Captions for GIFs. When selecting a GIF in the GIF panel, you can now add a caption directly to it – and send it all as one message .
March Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • 6 • 7 • 8 • 9 • More
item.content:encoded:
Captions for GIFs. When selecting a GIF in the GIF panel, you can now add a caption directly to it – and send it all as one message.

March Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • 6 • 7 • 8 • 9 • More

item.title: [Telegram News] ⭐️
item.description:
⭐️
Disable Sharing in Private Chats. Subscribers of Telegram Premium can now disable sharing in any 1-on-1 chat.
This restricts forwarding or copying messages and prevents screenshots or saving media from the chat.
March Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • 6 • 7 • 8 • 9 • More
item.content:encoded:
⭐️ Disable Sharing in Private Chats. Subscribers of Telegram Premium can now disable sharing in any 1-on-1 chat.

This restricts forwarding or copying messages and prevents screenshots or saving media from the chat.

March Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • 6 • 7 • 8 • 9 • More

item.title: [Telegram News] Member Tags.
item.description:
Member Tags. Members in group chats can now add a tag next to their name – to highlight roles and show their interests .
March Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • 6 • 7 • 8 • 9 • More
item.content:encoded:
Member Tags. Members in group chats can now add a tag next to their name – to highlight roles and show their interests.

March Features
1 • 2 • 3 • 4 • 5 • 6 • 7 • 8 • 9 • More
